prompt_text:
I'm going to describe two scenarios. In the memory scenario, a novel object called a xav has a property: it can be activated by pressing one of its buttons. Your job is to figure out which object in the perception scenario is the xav-analog, and therefore which button on it can be activated.

Memory scenario: There are 8 objects on a table: a xav, a zop, a dask, a jorp, a zink, a clop, a thorp, and a quib. The xav is underneath the zop. The zop is to-the-left-of the dask. The dask is above the jorp. The jorp is to-the-right-of the zink. The zink is underneath the clop. The clop is to-the-left-of the thorp. The thorp is above the quib. The xav has a yellow button on top, a red button on side, and a green button on bottom. The zop has a red button on top and a yellow button on back. The dask has a green button on top and a yellow button on back. The jorp has a red button on top and a yellow button on back. The zink has a red button on top and a yellow button on front. The clop has a green button on top and a yellow button on front. The thorp has a red button on top and a yellow button on bottom. The quib has a green button on top and a yellow button on front. Pressing the yellow button on the xav activates it.

Perception scenario: There are 8 objects on a shelf: a lurn, a klon, a emp, a woz, a trob, a brall, a jax, and a greeble. The emp is underneath the klon. The klon is to-the-left-of the greeble. The greeble is above the woz. The woz is to-the-right-of the lurn. The lurn is underneath the brall. The brall is to-the-left-of the trob. The trob is above the jax. The lurn has a green button on top and a green button on bottom. The klon has a red button on top, a yellow button on side, and a green button on bottom. The emp has a yellow button on top, a red button on side, and a green button on bottom. The woz has a green button on top and a red button on bottom. The trob has a green button on top and a red button on bottom. The brall has a green button on top and a red button on bottom. The jax has a red button on top and a red button on bottom. The greeble has a green button on top and a green button on bottom.

Which object in the perception scenario is the xav-analog, and which button activates it?
